FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.30sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f9a52d93600>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-05-13T20:07:44Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-13T20:06:02Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-05-13T20:07:44Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-13T20:06:02Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/05/13 20:09:20.400496622 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,

2026/05/13 20:09:20.400518776 {

2026/05/13 20:09:20.400612727 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/13 20:09:20.400622051 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/13 20:09:20.400622502 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/13 20:09:20.400631826 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/13 20:09:20.400632267 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/13 20:09:20.400641711 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/13 20:09:20.400642132 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/13 20:09:20.400654710 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/13 20:09:20.400655502 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/13 20:09:20.400670084 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/13 20:09:20.400671025 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/13 20:09:20.400686188 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/13 20:09:20.400686999 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/13 20:09:20.400711115 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/13 20:09:20.400711526 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/13 20:09:20.400721491 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/13 20:09:20.400721922 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/13 20:09:20.400731837 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/13 20:09:20.400732317 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/13 20:09:20.400748782 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/13 20:09:20.400749774 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/13 20:09:20.400764386 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/13 20:09:20.400780400 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/13 20:09:20.400781371 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/13 20:09:20.400798667 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/13 20:09:20.400799108 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/13 20:09:20.400808632 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/13 20:09:20.400809083 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/13 20:09:20.400820781 "default"))
2026/05/13 20:09:20.400821221 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/13 20:09:20.400835903 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/13 20:09:20.400836825 }
2026/05/13 20:09:20.400849985 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")

2026/05/13 20:09:20.400867491 if (length(family) == 4L) {

2026/05/13 20:09:20.400879459 }

2026/05/13 20:09:20.400888903 }

2026/05/13 20:09:20.400956385 old$family <- family
